calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-30-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES-NO APPEARANCE BY EUGENE ALEXANDER VLAHOS ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF JOHN B. VLAHOS (OWNER), PRESENT. DEFENDANTS JANET SMITH AND JOSE VELASQUEZ AKA JOSE VELAZQUEZ, PRESENT WITH ATTORNEY RYAN TAKEMOTO SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR ROXANE ALICIA POLIDORA ATTY. FOR DEFTS. JUDGE PRO TEM-MICHAEL RAIFSNIDER; CLERK-PARAM NATT; REPORTER-PATTY LEE HUBBLE.

CASE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, PARTIES STIPULATED TO THE TERMS AS FOLLOWS:- PLAINTIFF WAIVES BACK RENT AND DAILY DAMAGES FROM 6/30/04 TO 9/4/04, PROVIDED DEFTS. MOVE OUT OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 1288 MISSION STREET, APT 210. S.F. CALIF. ON OR BEFORE 9/4/04 BY 12PM MIDNIGHT. NO PHYSICAL EVICTION TO TAKE PLACE UNTIL 9/4/04. DEFTS. WILL NOT FILE FOR ANY EXENTIONS. IF DEFTS. MOVE OUT VOLUNTARILY BY 9/4/04, PLAINTIFF WILL FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS AND COURT FEES. DEFT HAS NO RIGHT TO FILE ANY CLAIMS AGAINST THE PLAINTIFF. FUTURE DAMAGES ARE NOT INCLUDED AT THIS TIME. IF DEFT. FAIL TO MOVE BY 9/4/04 PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN JUDGMENT. IF ALL TERMS ARE MET, DEFT. CAN SET ASIDE THE JUDGMENT. ALL PARTIES AGREE TO THE TERMS OF THE STIPULATION.
